title: Buried Chapter House of the Assassin
description:
A dead village. A guild of thieves. An assassin who paid too high a price for power. Beneath a forgotten frontier village lies a secret chapter house. Once a wizard's alchemical laboratory, now home to a guild of ettercap thieves. Their leader, the Iron Spider, has sacrificed his humanity for power he now sells to the highest bidder.

• An OSR-styled adventure location, organized for use at the table

• Context for quick integration into your game

• Complete area key with random encounters, stat blocks, traps, and

treasures

• Alchemical reaction table for experimentation

• Hand-drawn custom maps and art

Goof and Grump, LLC.
